forms.formDescription: Patient self-registration form for EHR integration.

components.label: SSN
components.tooltip: Social Security Number — used for patient deduplication in Epic

components.label: Medical Record Number (MRN)
components.description: Populated automatically when launched from EHR

components.label: EHR Patient ID
components.description: Epic patient identifier — do not edit

components.label: Patient Notes
components.placeholder: Any additional clinical context or notes...

components.label: Provider Review
components.title: Provider Review

components.label: Reviewer Comments
components.placeholder: Enter comments or reason for rejection...

components.label: Action
components.description: Only visible to the assigned provider/reviewer

components.label: Submit Review
Submit Registration

workflows.content:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<bpmn:definitions
  xmlns:bpmn="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/MODEL"
  xmlns:bpmndi="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/DI"
  xmlns:dc="http://www.omg.org/spec/DD/20100524/DC"
  xmlns:di="http://www.omg.org/spec/DD/20100524/DI"
  xmlns:camunda="http://camunda.org/schema/1.0/bpmn"
  xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
  id="Definitions_PatientInfo"
  targetNamespace="http://bpmn.io/schema/bpmn"
  exporter="Camunda Modeler"
  exporterVersion="4.8.1">

  <!-- =================================================================
       PROCESS: patient-info-workflow
       Flow:
         1. Patient submits registration form
         2. Reviewer reviews: Approve, Reject, or Return
         3a. Approved -> Build payload -> POST to ehr_connector /epic/patient-create
                      -> Update status = Approved -> End
         3b. Rejected -> Update status = Rejected -> End
         3c. Returned -> Update status = Returned -> User Task: Resubmit
                      -> Patient edits and submits -> Loops back to Review
       ================================================================= -->

  <bpmn:collaboration id="Collaboration_PatientInfo">
    <bpmn:participant id="Participant_PatientInfo"
                      name="Patient Info Registration"
                      processRef="patient-info-workflow" />
  </bpmn:collaboration>

  <bpmn:process id="patient-info-workflow"
                name="Patient Info Registration"
                isExecutable="true"
                camunda:versionTag="1">

    <!-- Lanes -->
    <bpmn:laneSet id="LaneSet_PatientInfo">
      <bpmn:lane id="Lane_Patient" name="Patient / Submitter">
        <bpmn:flowNodeRef>StartEvent_PatientSubmit</bpmn:flowNodeRef>
        <bpmn:flowNodeRef>Task_ResubmitForm</bpmn:flowNodeRef>
      </bpmn:lane>
      <bpmn:lane id="Lane_Provider" name="Provider / Reviewer">
        <bpmn:flowNodeRef>Task_ProviderReview</bpmn:flowNodeRef>
        <bpmn:flowNodeRef>Gateway_ProviderDecision</bpmn:flowNodeRef>
      </bpmn:lane>
      <bpmn:lane id="Lane_System" name="System (EHR Integration)">
        <bpmn:flowNodeRef>Task_BuildFHIRPayload</bpmn:flowNodeRef>
        <bpmn:flowNodeRef>Task_WritePatientToEpic</bpmn:flowNodeRef>
        <bpmn:flowNodeRef>Task_UpdateStatusApproved</bpmn:flowNodeRef>
        <bpmn:flowNodeRef>Task_UpdateStatusRejected</bpmn:flowNodeRef>
        <bpmn:flowNodeRef>Task_UpdateStatusReturned</bpmn:flowNodeRef>
        <bpmn:flowNodeRef>EndEvent_Approved</bpmn:flowNodeRef>
        <bpmn:flowNodeRef>EndEvent_Rejected</bpmn:flowNodeRef>
      </bpmn:lane>
    </bpmn:laneSet>

    <!-- Start Event -->
    <bpmn:startEvent id="StartEvent_PatientSubmit" name="Patient Submits Registration" camunda:initiator="start_userId">
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_Start_To_Review</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:startEvent>

    <!-- Flow: Start -> Provider Review -->
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_Start_To_Review"
                       sourceRef="StartEvent_PatientSubmit"
                       targetRef="Task_ProviderReview">
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <camunda:executionListener event="take">
          <camunda:script scriptFormat="javascript">
            execution.setVariable('applicationStatus', 'New');
          </camunda:script>
        </camunda:executionListener>
        <camunda:executionListener
          class="org.camunda.bpm.extension.hooks.listeners.BPMFormDataPipelineListener"
          event="take">
          <camunda:field name="fields">
            <camunda:expression>["applicationId","applicationStatus"]</camunda:expression>
          </camunda:field>
        </camunda:executionListener>
        <camunda:executionListener
          class="org.camunda.bpm.extension.hooks.listeners.ApplicationStateListener"
          event="take" />
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
    </bpmn:sequenceFlow>

    <!-- User Task: Provider Review -->
    <bpmn:userTask id="Task_ProviderReview"
                   name="Review Patient Registration"
                   camunda:candidateGroups="formsflow/formsflow-reviewer">
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <camunda:taskListener
          class="org.camunda.bpm.extension.hooks.listeners.FormBPMDataPipelineListener"
          event="create" />
        <camunda:taskListener
          class="org.camunda.bpm.extension.hooks.listeners.FormBPMDataPipelineListener"
          event="complete" />
        <camunda:taskListener event="complete">
          <camunda:script scriptFormat="javascript"><![CDATA[
            task.setVariable('deleteReason', 'completed');
          ]]></camunda:script>
        </camunda:taskListener>
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_Start_To_Review</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_Resubmit_To_Review</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_Review_To_Gateway</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:userTask>

    <!-- Flow: Provider Review -> Gateway -->
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_Review_To_Gateway"
                       sourceRef="Task_ProviderReview"
                       targetRef="Gateway_ProviderDecision">
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <camunda:executionListener
          class="org.camunda.bpm.extension.hooks.listeners.FormSubmissionListener"
          event="take" />
        <camunda:executionListener
          class="org.camunda.bpm.extension.hooks.listeners.ApplicationStateListener"
          event="take" />
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
    </bpmn:sequenceFlow>

    <!-- Gateway: Provider Decision -->
    <bpmn:exclusiveGateway id="Gateway_ProviderDecision" name="Provider Decision?">
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_Review_To_Gateway</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_Gateway_To_BuildPayload</bpmn:outgoing>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_Gateway_To_Rejected</bpmn:outgoing>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_Gateway_To_Returned</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:exclusiveGateway>

    <!-- Flow: Gateway -> Build Payload (Approved) -->
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_Gateway_To_BuildPayload"
                       name="Approved"
                       sourceRef="Gateway_ProviderDecision"
                       targetRef="Task_BuildFHIRPayload">
      <bpmn:conditionExpression xsi:type="bpmn:tFormalExpression">
        ${action == 'Approved'}
      </bpmn:conditionExpression>
    </bpmn:sequenceFlow>

    <!-- Flow: Gateway -> Rejected -->
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_Gateway_To_Rejected"
                       name="Rejected"
                       sourceRef="Gateway_ProviderDecision"
                       targetRef="Task_UpdateStatusRejected">
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <camunda:executionListener event="take">
          <camunda:script scriptFormat="javascript"><![CDATA[
            execution.setVariable('applicationStatus', 'Rejected');
          ]]></camunda:script>
        </camunda:executionListener>
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
      <bpmn:conditionExpression xsi:type="bpmn:tFormalExpression">
        ${action == 'Rejected'}
      </bpmn:conditionExpression>
    </bpmn:sequenceFlow>

    <!-- Flow: Gateway -> Returned -->
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_Gateway_To_Returned"
                       name="Returned"
                       sourceRef="Gateway_ProviderDecision"
                       targetRef="Task_UpdateStatusReturned">
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <camunda:executionListener event="take">
          <camunda:script scriptFormat="javascript"><![CDATA[
            execution.setVariable('applicationStatus', 'Resubmit');
          ]]></camunda:script>
        </camunda:executionListener>
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
      <bpmn:conditionExpression xsi:type="bpmn:tFormalExpression">
        ${action == 'Returned'}
      </bpmn:conditionExpression>
    </bpmn:sequenceFlow>

    <!-- Task: Update Status Rejected -->
    <bpmn:task id="Task_UpdateStatusRejected" name="Update Status Rejected">
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <camunda:executionListener
          class="org.camunda.bpm.extension.hooks.listeners.ApplicationStateListener"
          event="end" />
        <camunda:executionListener
          class="org.camunda.bpm.extension.hooks.listeners.BPMFormDataPipelineListener"
          event="start">
          <camunda:field name="fields">
            <camunda:expression>["applicationId","applicationStatus"]</camunda:expression>
          </camunda:field>
        </camunda:executionListener>
        <camunda:executionListener
          class="org.camunda.bpm.extension.hooks.listeners.FormSubmissionListener"
          event="start" />
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_Gateway_To_Rejected</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_UpdateRejected_To_End</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:task>

    <!-- Flow: Update Status Rejected -> End Event Rejected -->
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_UpdateRejected_To_End"
                       sourceRef="Task_UpdateStatusRejected"
                       targetRef="EndEvent_Rejected" />

    <bpmn:endEvent id="EndEvent_Rejected" name="Registration Rejected">
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_UpdateRejected_To_End</bpmn:incoming>
    </bpmn:endEvent>

    <!-- Task: Update Status Returned -->
    <bpmn:task id="Task_UpdateStatusReturned" name="Update Status Resubmit">
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <camunda:executionListener
          class="org.camunda.bpm.extension.hooks.listeners.ApplicationStateListener"
          event="end" />
        <camunda:executionListener
          class="org.camunda.bpm.extension.hooks.listeners.BPMFormDataPipelineListener"
          event="start">
          <camunda:field name="fields">
            <camunda:expression>["applicationId","applicationStatus"]</camunda:expression>
          </camunda:field>
        </camunda:executionListener>
        <camunda:executionListener
          class="org.camunda.bpm.extension.hooks.listeners.FormSubmissionListener"
          event="start" />
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_Gateway_To_Returned</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_UpdateReturned_To_Resubmit</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:task>

    <!-- Flow: Update Status Returned -> Resubmit Task -->
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_UpdateReturned_To_Resubmit"
                       sourceRef="Task_UpdateStatusReturned"
                       targetRef="Task_ResubmitForm" />

    <!-- Receive Task: Resubmit Form -->
    <bpmn:receiveTask id="Task_ResubmitForm"
                      name="Resubmit Registration Form"
                      messageRef="Message_application_resubmitted">
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <camunda:executionListener event="start">
          <camunda:script scriptFormat="javascript">
            execution.setVariable('applicationStatus', 'Resubmit');
          </camunda:script>
        </camunda:executionListener>
        <camunda:executionListener
          class="org.camunda.bpm.extension.hooks.listeners.ApplicationStateListener"
          event="start" />
        <camunda:executionListener
          class="org.camunda.bpm.extension.hooks.listeners.BPMFormDataPipelineListener"
          event="start">
          <camunda:field name="fields">
            <camunda:expression>["applicationId","applicationStatus"]</camunda:expression>
          </camunda:field>
        </camunda:executionListener>
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_UpdateReturned_To_Resubmit</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_Resubmit_To_Review</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:receiveTask>

    <!-- Flow: Resubmit -> Review (Loops back) -->
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_Resubmit_To_Review"
                       sourceRef="Task_ResubmitForm"
                       targetRef="Task_ProviderReview">
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <camunda:executionListener event="take">
          <camunda:script scriptFormat="javascript">
            execution.setVariable('applicationStatus', 'Resubmitted');
          </camunda:script>
        </camunda:executionListener>
        <camunda:executionListener
          class="org.camunda.bpm.extension.hooks.listeners.BPMFormDataPipelineListener"
          event="take">
          <camunda:field name="fields">
            <camunda:expression>["applicationId","applicationStatus"]</camunda:expression>
          </camunda:field>
        </camunda:executionListener>
        <camunda:executionListener
          class="org.camunda.bpm.extension.hooks.listeners.ApplicationStateListener"
          event="take" />
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
    </bpmn:sequenceFlow>

    <!-- Script Task: Build FHIR Payload -->
    <bpmn:scriptTask id="Task_BuildFHIRPayload"
                     name="Build FHIR Patient Payload"
                     scriptFormat="javascript">
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <camunda:executionListener
          class="org.camunda.bpm.extension.hooks.listeners.FormBPMDataPipelineListener"
          event="start" />
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_Gateway_To_BuildPayload</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_BuildPayload_To_WriteEpic</bpmn:outgoing>
      <bpmn:script><![CDATA[
        function getVar(name) {
          try {
            var val = execution.getVariable(name);
            return (val !== null && val !== undefined) ? String(val) : '';
          } catch (e) {
            return '';
          }
        }

        var personalInfoRaw = execution.getVariable('personalInformation');
        
        function parsePersonalInfo(raw) {
          if (!raw) return null;
          try {
            var rawStr = String(raw).trim();
            if (rawStr.indexOf('{') === 0) {
              return JSON.parse(rawStr);
            }
          } catch (e) {
            java.lang.System.out.println("Error parsing JSON: " + e);
          }
          return raw;
        }
        var personalInfo = parsePersonalInfo(personalInfoRaw);

        function getField(obj, path) {
          if (!obj) return null;
          var curr = obj;
          for (var i = 0; i < path.length; i++) {
            var key = path[i];
            if (curr instanceof java.util.Map) {
              curr = curr.get(key);
            } else if (curr && typeof curr === 'object') {
              curr = curr[key];
            } else {
              return null;
            }
            if (curr === null || curr === undefined) return null;
          }
          return curr;
        }

        function getFieldStr(obj, path) {
          var val = getField(obj, path);
          return (val !== null && val !== undefined) ? String(val) : '';
        }

        function getFieldDate(obj, path) {
          var val = getField(obj, path);
          if (!val) return '';
          if (val instanceof java.util.Date) {
            var sdf = new java.text.SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd");
            return sdf.format(val);
          }
          var valStr = String(val);
          if (valStr.indexOf('T') !== -1) {
            try {
              var instant = java.time.Instant.parse(valStr);
              var zoneId = java.time.ZoneId.systemDefault();
              var zonedDateTime = instant.atZone(zoneId);
              var dtf = java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("yyyy-MM-dd");
              return zonedDateTime.format(dtf);
            } catch (e) {
              return valStr.split('T')[0];
            }
          }
          return valStr;
        }

        var firstName = getFieldStr(personalInfo, ['firstName']);
        var lastName = getFieldStr(personalInfo, ['lastName']);
        var dob = getFieldDate(personalInfo, ['dateOfBirth']);
        var email = getFieldStr(personalInfo, ['container', 'email']);
        var phone = getFieldStr(personalInfo, ['container', 'phoneNumber']);
        var addr1 = getFieldStr(personalInfo, ['container', 'addressLine1']);
        var addr2 = getFieldStr(personalInfo, ['container', 'addressLine2']);
        var city = getFieldStr(personalInfo, ['container', 'city']);
        var state = getFieldStr(personalInfo, ['container', 'state']);
        var pin = getFieldStr(personalInfo, ['container', 'pincode']);

        var middleName = getFieldStr(personalInfo, ['middleName']);
        var gender = getFieldStr(personalInfo, ['gender']);
        var marital = getFieldStr(personalInfo, ['maritalStatus']);
        var notes = getFieldStr(personalInfo, ['patientNotes']);
        var comments = getFieldStr(personalInfo, ['reviewerComments']);
        var ssn = getFieldStr(personalInfo, ['ssn']);
        var country = getFieldStr(personalInfo, ['container', 'country']) || 'USA';
        var mrn = getFieldStr(personalInfo, ['medicalRecordNumber']);

        if (mrn === '') {
          mrn = 'MRN-' + java.util.UUID.randomUUID().toString().substring(0, 8).toUpperCase();
        }

        java.lang.System.out.println("--- Task_BuildFHIRPayload: Extracted Variables ---");
        java.lang.System.out.println("firstName=" + firstName + ", lastName=" + lastName + ", dob=" + dob);
        java.lang.System.out.println("email=" + email + ", phone=" + phone + ", addr1=" + addr1);
        java.lang.System.out.println("city=" + city + ", state=" + state + ", pin=" + pin);
        java.lang.System.out.println("mrn=" + mrn + ", ssn=" + ssn);

        if (!firstName || !lastName || !dob || !email || !phone || !addr1 || !city || !state || !pin) {
          java.lang.System.out.println("Task_BuildFHIRPayload ERROR: Required validation failed!");
          throw new org.camunda.bpm.engine.delegate.BpmnError("VALIDATION_ERROR", "Required fields are missing for patient registration");
        }

        // Build name
        var givenNames = [firstName];
        if (middleName !== '') { givenNames.push(middleName); }

        // Build address
        var addrLines = [addr1];
        if (addr2 !== '') { addrLines.push(addr2); }

        // Build telecom
        var telecom = [];
        telecom.push({ system: 'phone', value: phone, use: 'home' });
        if (email !== '') {
          telecom.push({ system: 'email', value: email });
        }

        // Build identifiers
        var identifiers = [];
        if (mrn !== '') {
          identifiers.push({
            use: 'usual',
            type: {
              coding: [{
                system: 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v2-0203',
                code: 'MR',
                display: 'Medical Record Number'
              }]
            },
            value: mrn
          });
        }
        if (ssn !== '') {
          identifiers.push({
            use: 'official',
            type: {
              coding: [{
                system: 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v2-0203',
                code: 'SS',
                display: 'Social Security number'
              }]
            },
            system: 'http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/us-ssn',
            value: ssn
          });
        }

        var maritalObj = null;
        if (marital !== '') {
          maritalObj = {
            coding: [{ system: 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-MaritalStatus', code: marital }]
          };
        }

        var fhirPatient = {
          resourceType: 'Patient',
          identifier: identifiers,
          active: true,
          name: [{
            use: 'official',
            family: lastName,
            given: givenNames
          }],
          telecom: telecom,
          gender: gender || 'unknown',
          birthDate: dob,
          address: [{
            use: 'home',
            type: 'physical',
            line: addrLines,
            city: city,
            state: state,
            postalCode: pin,
            country: country
          }]
        };

        if (maritalObj !== null) {
          fhirPatient.maritalStatus = maritalObj;
        }

        var payload = JSON.stringify({
          fhirPatient: fhirPatient,
          reviewerComments: comments,
          notes: notes,
          applicationId: getVar('applicationId')
        });

        java.lang.System.out.println("Task_BuildFHIRPayload SUCCESS: Payload generated.");
        execution.setVariable('ehrPatientPayload', payload);
      ]]></bpmn:script>
    </bpmn:scriptTask>

    <!-- Flow: Build Payload -> Write to Epic -->
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_BuildPayload_To_WriteEpic"
                       sourceRef="Task_BuildFHIRPayload"
                       targetRef="Task_WritePatientToEpic" />

    <!-- Service Task: Write Patient to Epic -->
    <bpmn:serviceTask id="Task_WritePatientToEpic"
                      name="Write Patient to Epic (FHIR)">
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <camunda:connector>
          <camunda:inputOutput>
            <camunda:inputParameter name="url">${EHR_CONNECTOR_URL}/epic/patient-create</camunda:inputParameter>
            <camunda:inputParameter name="method">POST</camunda:inputParameter>
            <camunda:inputParameter name="headers">
              <camunda:map>
                <camunda:entry key="Content-Type">application/json</camunda:entry>
                <camunda:entry key="Accept">application/json</camunda:entry>
              </camunda:map>
            </camunda:inputParameter>
            <camunda:inputParameter name="payload">${ehrPatientPayload}</camunda:inputParameter>
            <camunda:outputParameter name="ehrResponse">${response}</camunda:outputParameter>
          </camunda:inputOutput>
          <camunda:connectorId>http-connector</camunda:connectorId>
        </camunda:connector>
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_BuildPayload_To_WriteEpic</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_WriteEpic_To_UpdateApproved</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:serviceTask>

    <!-- Flow: Write to Epic -> Update Status Approved -->
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_WriteEpic_To_UpdateApproved"
                       sourceRef="Task_WritePatientToEpic"
                       targetRef="Task_UpdateStatusApproved" />

    <!-- Task: Update Status Approved -->
    <!-- Maps returned Epic patientId and medicalRecordNumber back to formsflow -->
    <bpmn:task id="Task_UpdateStatusApproved" name="Update Status Approved">
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <camunda:executionListener
          class="org.camunda.bpm.extension.hooks.listeners.ApplicationStateListener"
          event="end" />
        <camunda:executionListener event="start">
          <camunda:script scriptFormat="javascript"><![CDATA[
            // Set applicationStatus to Approved
            execution.setVariable('applicationStatus', 'Approved');

            // Parse response to extract patientId and medicalRecordNumber
            var ehrResponse = execution.getVariable('ehrResponse');
            var json = JSON.parse(ehrResponse);
            
            // Set variables to sync back to formsflow.ai
            execution.setVariable('personalInformation/patientId', json.id);
            
            // Extract MRN from identifier array
            var mrn = '';
            if (json.identifier && json.identifier.length > 0) {
              for (var i = 0; i < json.identifier.length; i++) {
                var ident = json.identifier[i];
                if (ident.type && ident.type.coding && ident.type.coding.length > 0) {
                  var coding = ident.type.coding[0];
                  if (coding.code === 'MR') {
                    mrn = ident.value;
                    break;
                  }
                }
              }
            }
            // Fallback to id if MRN not explicitly mapped in bundle
            if (mrn === '') {
              mrn = json.id;
            }
            execution.setVariable('personalInformation/medicalRecordNumber', mrn);
          ]]></camunda:script>
        </camunda:executionListener>
        <camunda:executionListener
          class="org.camunda.bpm.extension.hooks.listeners.BPMFormDataPipelineListener"
          event="start">
          <camunda:field name="fields">
            <camunda:expression>["applicationId","applicationStatus","personalInformation/patientId","personalInformation/medicalRecordNumber"]</camunda:expression>
          </camunda:field>
        </camunda:executionListener>
        <camunda:executionListener
          class="org.camunda.bpm.extension.hooks.listeners.FormSubmissionListener"
          event="start" />
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_WriteEpic_To_UpdateApproved</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_UpdateApproved_To_End</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:task>

    <!-- Flow: Update Approved -> End Approved -->
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_UpdateApproved_To_End"
                       sourceRef="Task_UpdateStatusApproved"
                       targetRef="EndEvent_Approved" />

    <bpmn:endEvent id="EndEvent_Approved" name="Patient Registered in Epic">
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_UpdateApproved_To_End</bpmn:incoming>
    </bpmn:endEvent>

  </bpmn:process>

  <bpmn:message id="Message_application_resubmitted" name="application_resubmitted" />

  <!-- Layout / DI Definitions -->
  <bpmndi:BPMNDiagram id="BPMNDiagram_PatientInfo">
    <bpmndi:BPMNPlane id="BPMNPlane_PatientInfo" bpmnElement="Collaboration_PatientInfo">
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Participant_PatientInfo_di" bpmnElement="Participant_PatientInfo" isHorizontal="true">
        <dc:Bounds x="120" y="80" width="1180" height="600" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Lane_Patient_di" bpmnElement="Lane_Patient" isHorizontal="true">
        <dc:Bounds x="150" y="80" width="1150" height="150" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Lane_Provider_di" bpmnElement="Lane_Provider" isHorizontal="true">
        <dc:Bounds x="150" y="230" width="1150" height="170" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Lane_System_di" bpmnElement="Lane_System" isHorizontal="true">
        <dc:Bounds x="150" y="400" width="1150" height="280" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
